Subject.description: Subject identifier used as a blocking factor in the two-way analysis of variance.

Plasma_aldosterone_Low_Day1.description: Plasma aldosterone level (mmol/l) measured at low altitude on Day 1. Same subjects as Day 2 and Day 3 measurements, representing repeated measures across different days/altitudes.

Plasma_aldosterone_High_Day2.description: Plasma aldosterone level (mmol/l) measured at high altitude (4300 m) on Day 2. Same subjects as Day 1 and Day 3 measurements, representing repeated measures across different days/altitudes.

Plasma_aldosterone_High_Day3.description: Plasma aldosterone level (mmol/l) measured at high altitude (4300 m) on Day 3. Same subjects as Day 1 and Day 2 measurements, representing repeated measures across different days/altitudes.
